review_context: Phase 2a borderline label validation — pre-Phase-2b sanity check on the 13 cases where label.protect=True but ensemble final ≠ legit_drafting_error

kept_cases.rationale: Patent claim antecedent requires exact match (with limited legit permutations). Drafter mistyped 該使用者裝置 as 該使用者介面 in claim 1 and propagated into claim 2. Walker correctly flagged.
Drafter typo: numeral (222) misplaced after verb 銜接 instead of after noun 第一銜接部. Compare correct form `所述第一銜接部(222)銜接` in claim 5. Walker correctly flagged the precision mismatch.

demoted_cases.rationale: Walker missed the bare-noun intro `页表` after verb `建立` in claim 1 itself. Sonnet correctly identified the intro pattern; gpt-5-mini failed to produce verdict (token cap).
Same pattern as case 3 — walker missed `建立页表` intro in claim 7.

demoted_cases.walker_pattern_gap: Pattern B intro with enumerator-form member (`包括各节点`)
demoted_cases.rationale: Walker missed the Pattern B-style intro `所述兴趣点异构图包括…各节点` in claim 1. The enumerator `各节点` is the listed Pattern-B member; the bare `节点` should be derivable.

demoted_cases.walker_pattern_gap: Pattern B intro with enumerator-form member
demoted_cases.rationale: Same as case 5 — claim 9 mirrors claim 1 structure.
Walker term `第四神经网` is a tokenization fragment of `第四神经网络` (full compound). The full term is introduced bare in claim 42 itself: `接收来自所述第一设备的第四神经网络的信息`.
Walker missed bare-noun intro `差异度` in ancestor claim 82 (`差异度满足第一条件`). Original 'parallel-only [11, 124]' label conflated this with parallel-claim cases.
Same as case 8 — walker missed `相似度` intro in ancestor claim 82.
Same as case 7 — `第四神经网` is tokenization fragment; `第四神经网络` introduced within claim 121.
Walker missed bare-noun intro `差异度` in ancestor claim 124.
Same as case 11 — walker missed `相似度` intro in ancestor claim 124.

demoted_cases.walker_pattern_gap: bare-noun intro in ancestor claim via possessive
demoted_cases.rationale: Walker missed bare-noun intro `输入数据` in ancestor claim 24 (`基于用户的输入数据`). Original 'parallel-only [1, 24]' label conflated parent claim 24 with parallel claim 1.

walker_round_implications.summary: Three distinct walker pattern gaps surfaced, all worth tracking for future walker-round work:

gaps.name: verb-object bare-noun intro
examples_from_review: 建立页表 → 所述页表
gaps.fix_strategy: Add a walker pattern recognizing bare-noun direct-object after specific creation/establishment verbs (建立, 产生, 形成, 生成, 获取). DR-1 grounding: only ~2 confirmed cases; wait for ≥3 in walker-round queue per close-out trigger #2.

gaps.name: Pattern B intro with enumerator-form member
examples_from_review: 包括各节点 → 所述节点
gaps.fix_strategy: Walker should split `各X` enumerator forms inside Pattern B head-clauses and credit X as introduced. Currently walker treats `各X` as anti-introduction (Anti-pattern 3). Needs Phase-3 mechanism design before relaxing.

gaps.name: compound-noun tokenization fragments
examples_from_review: 第四神经网 from 第四神经网络
gaps.impact: moderate (existing walker_fp.fragment subcategory had 7 cases pre-review; +2 from this review = 9)
gaps.fix_strategy: Tokenizer trailing-character extension; standard walker-round work. May warrant dedicated round if .fragment cluster grows.

walker_round_implications.trigger_status: Below close-out trigger #2 threshold (≥3 confirmed walker FPs accumulated from triage-report queue in same jurisdiction). This review adds 11 confirmed FPs but they're in 3 distinct sub-clusters; walker-round can decide whether to bundle or wait.
